title: PTAH: An Agentic Harness for Credible Multimodal Deep Research

defines.name: PTAH
defines.definition: An agentic harness that coordinates specialized agents, external tools, intermediate research states, and verification signals to generate credible interleaved multimodal research reports.

defines.name: PTAHEval
defines.definition: An evaluation protocol that extends deep research benchmarks with image-level and presentation-level assessments for interleaved image-text reports.

problem: Existing deep research systems struggle to produce verifiable multimodal reports because open-ended synthesis lacks deterministic ground truth and visual evidence is not tightly integrated with text.
